headline: Alexandria Real Estate: Thesis Has Evolved, Same Hold, Different Goalposts
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) hold: policy clarity helps, but weak leasing, lower NOI & 2027 expirations pressure FFO. Click here to read my analysis.
